title: nervilia pubilabia
intro: Nervilia pubilabia, also known as the Yellow Nervilia, is a species of orchid native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and pubescent leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, believed to possess medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Nervilia pubilabia include its potential to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Nervilia pubilabia typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, then using them to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
